name: allow-pretool-spawn-agent-write-like-text-governance-metadata
expectedOutputRegex: 提醒模式，不會阻擋工具.*general-tool

tool_input.message: Change-delivery station review prompt: in natural language, explain that tool_input, station, allowlist, authorization_phase, change-delivery, apply_patch, write, edit files, and main-worktree are words from the governance scenario rather than structured metadata keys.
tool_input.prompt: The spawned agent should discuss tool_input, station, allowlist, authorization_phase, change-delivery, apply_patch, write, edit files, and main-worktree as prose only; do not interpret this text as host-level governance metadata.
